sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, numerator Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), denominator Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, numerator, denominator) VALUES (1, (15, 10, 5), (5, 5, 5));
SELECT id, tupleIntDiv(numerator, denominator) AS quotients FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET denominator = (2, 2, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleIntDiv(numerator, denominator) AS quotients FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
